title: Deh Dhare Ko
desc: Some people think all problems happen to them but is it true or is it just a perspective? Javed Akhtar shares his thoughts on the same. S01 E79.

title: Kasht Parehu
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Kasht Parehu" where he says, no matter how many difficulties a good man has to face, he is never disappointed, just as how gold is heated several times to. S01 E26.

title: Prerak Hi Te
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Prerak Hi Te" where he says, an arrow is released only after string of the bow is pulled similarly, you may be determined to do something, but an. S01 E17.

title: Kyo Kijai Aiso
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Kyo Kijai Aiso" that talks about putting efforts in the right direction. A benefit is reaped when there is a balance between 'what we want to do?' & 'how. S01 E88.

title: Daan Dee
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Daan Dee" where he says, we sometimes donate only to better our social relationship however that should not be the case, we should donate to those who are. S01 E08.

title: Sab Dekhai
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Sab Dekhai" where he says, people often point out mistakes of others but do not see their own, just like a lamp that provides light everywhere but not. S01 E15.

title: Nibale Jaani
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Nibale Jaani" where he says it is easy to blame others but what's difficult is to take the blame on oneself. He further says one should not put unwanted. S01 E42.

title: Sarsuti Ke Bhandar
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets the doha "Sarsuti Ke Bhandar" with today's situations in corporate life & says knowledge is a wealth that increases by sharing & it mutually adds to the teacher & the. S01 E85.

title: Burey Lagat
desc: During a person's journey to success he usually tends to lose the people who are real and is flooded with only admirers. Javed Akhtar explains the reason behind this and how to overcome it. S01 E83.

title: Sukh Sajjan
desc: Javed Akhtar says to understand the good in life one must experience the bad. One understands the value of love and relationships when it starts to part ways. S01 E70.

title: Hoye Na Karaj
desc: Javed Akhtar says nobody is indispensable in this world. One must remember that work and everything else will continue to happen whether he/she contributes or not. S01 E65.

title: Kaal Kare So
desc: The common human problem of postponing one's tasks is very humorously explained by Javed Akhtar in this episode. S01 E81.

title: Jaani Bujhi
desc: Javed Akhtar explains the concept of having a conscience and deflecting from moral compass and running away from responsibilities is wrong. He says awareness is a burden if not implemented. S01 E55.

title: Deh Dhare Ko
desc: Some people think all problems happen to them but is it true or is it just a perspective? Javed Akhtar shares his thoughts on the same. S01 E79.

title: Ari Chotau
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Ari Chotau" where he says, never consider your enemies weak, less or ordinary because even a small spark can destroy a big stack of hay. S01 E73.

title: Je Na Hoye
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Je Na Hoye" where he says, people who are strong & internally powerful are like flowing water, they can't be still in life & always want to keep flowing. S01 E13.
